findings.description: The source introduction lists two specific behavioral outcomes of the feature that are omitted from the knowledge file: (1) ウェブにおいて一部機能へのアクセスを遮断し、503エラーを返す、(2) 常駐バッチにおいて、空回り（処理せずに待機する状態）を行う。These describe what actually happens when service is unavailable and are decision-necessary for correct implementation expectations.
findings.source_evidence: 「ウェブにおいて一部機能へのアクセスを遮断し、503エラーを返す。」「常駐バッチにおいて、空回り(処理せずに待機する状態)を行う。」（機能説明の冒頭箇条書き）

findings.description: The class `BasicApplicationInitializer` appears in the usage section's XML configuration (`nablarch.core.repository.initialization.BasicApplicationInitializer`) but is not included in the hints for the usage section.
